Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To Extend The Discovery Cutoff, Or Alt., Appointment Of Special Discovery Referee
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Henry Dea's Motion for leave to extend the discovery cutoff or, alternatively, appointment of special discovery referee: granted in part, denied in part:
1. There being no opposition on file, the discovery cutoff date is extended to and including July 17, 2009;
2. Motion appointment of special discovery referee is denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
